compiled_state.title: Add Tag Policy section, cross-references, and CLAUDE.md Quick Reference entries
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Exemption Justification
Unit exemption criterion 3: "static assets only / non-executable instruction files". Task 2 modifies only Markdown documentation files with no executable behavior. Rule 5 of the behavioral testing standard applies. All structural boundary tests are in Task 1 (RED).

## Implementation

1. Add "## Tag Policy" section to plugins/dso/docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md (after the existing final section) with subsections:
   - **Guarded Tags**: document brainstorm:complete (requires PIL heading at add time via _tag_add_checked; explicitly removable via `ticket untag`)
   - **Unguarded Tags**: all other tags; policy errs toward flexibility
   - **Writer Taxonomy**: additive writes (`ticket tag`/`ticket untag` CLI; `_tag_add`/`_tag_remove` in ticket-lib.sh) vs full-replacement writes (`ticket edit --tags=`); migration script carve-out retained for provenance; concurrent-writer race accepted (same tolerance as full-replacement)
   - **Accepted Limitations**: concurrent-writer race; source enforcement ("only skill X writes tag Y") is infeasible

2. Add cross-reference to plugins/dso/docs/contracts/scrutiny-pending-tag.md (end of file, since no Related Contracts section exists):
   `- Tag Policy (docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md#tag-policy) — meta-policy governing tag guards, writer taxonomy, and accepted limitations`

3. Add cross-reference to plugins/dso/docs/contracts/interaction-deferred-tag.md (Related Contracts section):
   `- Tag Policy (docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md#tag-policy) — meta-policy governing tag guards, writer taxonomy, and accepted limitations`

4. Add two rows to CLAUDE.md Quick Reference table (after the existing "Close a ticket" row or near the ticket subcommands):
   | Add tag to a ticket | `.claude/scripts/dso ticket tag <id> <tag>` |
   | Remove tag from a ticket | `.claude/scripts/dso ticket untag <id> <tag>` |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (all 6 RED tests from Task 1 now GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Architecture doc contains "Tag Policy" section heading
  Verify: grep -q 'Tag Policy' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md
- [ ] Architecture doc mentions brainstorm:complete as guarded tag
  Verify: grep -q 'brainstorm:complete' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md
- [ ] Architecture doc mentions "additive" in writer taxonomy
  Verify: grep -q 'additive' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/ticket-system-v3-architecture.md
- [ ] scrutiny-pending-tag.md contains cross-reference to ticket-system-v3-architecture.md
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket-system-v3-architecture' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/scrutiny-pending-tag.md
- [ ] interaction-deferred-tag.md contains cross-reference to ticket-system-v3-architecture.md
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket-system-v3-architecture' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/contracts/interaction-deferred-tag.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md Quick Reference table contains "ticket tag" entry
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket tag' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md Quick Reference table contains "ticket untag" entry
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket untag' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
